message:
feat(harness): expand E2E traceability module with parallel WAL buffer pilot

Add comprehensive test script entry for the parallel per-core WAL buffer pilot
with deterministic replay artifacts (bd_ncivz_1_parallel_wal_buffer_pilot.sh).
This entry includes proper scenario mapping (E2E-CNC-007), storage mode
specifications (WAL and FileBacked), concurrency configuration, and artifact
collection setup.

Additionally update asupersync dependency from 0.2.0 to 0.2.2 and add blake3
as an explicit dependency to fsqlite-harness, reflecting the enhanced
cryptographic and buffer management capabilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -486,6 +486,23 @@ pub fn build_canonical_inventory() -> TraceabilityMatrix {
         .build(),
     );
 
+    scripts.push(
+        ScriptEntryBuilder::new(
+            "e2e/bd_ncivz_1_parallel_wal_buffer_pilot.sh",
+            ScriptKind::ShellE2e,
+            "Parallel per-core WAL buffer pilot with deterministic replay artifacts",
+        )
+        .bead("bd-ncivz.1")
+        .command("bash e2e/bd_ncivz_1_parallel_wal_buffer_pilot.sh --json")
+        .json_output()
+        .scenarios(&["E2E-CNC-007"])
+        .storage(&[StorageMode::Wal, StorageMode::FileBacked])
+        .concurrency(&[ConcurrencyMode::ConcurrentWriters])
+        .artifacts(&["artifacts/ncivz_1_parallel_wal_buffer/"])
+        .timeout(900)
+        .build(),
+    );
+
     scripts.push(
         ScriptEntryBuilder::new(
             "e2e/fts3_compat_report.sh",
